voice_observations.caption_text:
Come Together with @nassarromy and @nassarstephanie
Bold, powerful and entirely their own. Romy and Stéphanie speak to Level Shoes about sisterhood, inspiration and the beauty of growing side by side. 🤍
voice_observations.voiceover_text: To be surrounded by things that gravitate towards my heart, that is the center of it all for me. I'm Romy, I'm a model, business owner and artist. I'm Stephanie, I'm a fashion designer and artist. Coming together is definitely feeling home. A piece of advice that Romy's given me is her courage, the way she thinks and the dreams. It always inspires me to be a better person, to go after my goals, to not be afraid. I would say that Stephanie, she's my younger sister, but she's very generous and selfless and I always look up to that. When I think about being better, I think about Stephanie's ways. I would describe Romy's style as vibrant, very bold, unique, very her. I would describe Stephanie's style as powerful, classy with her Stephanie touch. If I were a shoe, I would be all of them. I'm always looking for passion, real vibes, and I want the shoe to reflect exactly that. I would definitely be high heels, stilettos or boots. They make me feel very powerful and very myself. Comedian, best friend. She's my inspiration.
notable_phrases: Bold, powerful and entirely their own. Romy and Stéphanie speak to Level Shoes about sisterhood, inspiration and the beauty of growing side by side
